{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-24.
8,962 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
14 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 4 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-25): ['34927', '390530', '534802', '953884']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-23 -> 2026-03-24)

- "Which country's citizens will Australia say are covered by its temporary six-month visitor ban, in a Home Affairs announcement by March 31, 2026?"

- "What country will Latvian officials say a drone that crashes after entering from Russian airspace may be linked to by March 31, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Russia: 0.09, China: 0.04, Belarus: 0.04} | Truth: Ukraine
  Brier: -0.01 | TW-Score: -1.57

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 330 (316 resolved, 14 active)
- accuracy: 8.2% | brier skill score: 0.026 | time weighted score: 573.24
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
